$comment: Copy to ~/.claude/codex-delegate.config.json (global) and/or <repo>/codex-delegate.config.json (per-project; project wins). Every field is optional — omit anything you want to leave at its built-in default. Full reference: skills/codex-delegate/references/configuration.md
customRules: When I finish building a web page or HTML artifact, open it in Chrome so I can see it.
After generating a report or document, open it in Pages (or Preview for a PDF).
Route large mechanical refactors that touch many files to Codex.
